chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 07 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner, at the very outset, submits that petitioner has filed an appeal before the Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, Ghotki against private respondents against order dated 07.06.2023 passed by Assistant Commissioner, Ghotki, which is not being decided. Learned AAG undertakes that he would communicate directions of this Court to Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, Ghotki for deciding the appeal of the petitioner, if already pending, within a period of two months, in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of AAG Sindh for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
